id.description: The identifier of the option grant.

issuerId.description: The identifier of the issuer that issued the option grant.

stakeholderId.description: The identifier of the stakeholder that holds the option grant.

equityIncentivePlanName.description: The name of the equity incentive plan (i.e., option plan) associated with this option grant.

issueDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

vestingStartDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

boardApprovalDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

stakeholderAcceptanceDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

canceledDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

grantExpirationDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

lastExercisableDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

disqualificationDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

isoNsoSplit.description:
True if the grant has ISO/NSO split. False otherwise.

Learn more about [the ISO $100K limit and ISO/NSO splits](https://support.carta.com/s/article/100k-rule).

stockOptionType.description:
Enumeration of stock option grant types.

 - ISO: The stock options are incentive stock options (ISOs).
 - NSO: The stock options are non-qualified stock options (NSOs).
 - OTHER: The stock options are neither ISOs nor NSOs.

value.description:
A decimal amount represented in string form.

Examples:
0
0.0
1.00
123.45
-456.0
.321
+1.23456e-3
1e-05

securityLabel.description: The label representing this security (option grant).

earlyExercisable.description: True if the option grant is eligible for early exercising; false if the option grant is not eligible for early exercising.

performanceCondition.description:
Indicates that this vesting event has associated performance or milestone vesting conditions.

`performanceCondition` will be `true` for milestone- and performance-based vesting events.

For performance-based vesting events, `performanceCondition` indicates that a performance condition exists, not that it has been met.

vested.description: Indicates that this vesting event has vested.

vestingEvents.description: The list of all vesting events associated with this grant. For time based vesting events, both past and future vesting details will be available. For performance and milestone based vesting, only achieved vesting events will be available.

fairMarketValueAsOfDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

exerciseDate.description: A complete calendar date defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

status.description:
Enumeration of exercise status.

 - STATUS_PENDING: The exercise is in a pending state.
 - STATUS_COMPLETE: The exercise is complete and a certificate was issued.
 - STATUS_CANCELED: The exercise is canceled.

certificateId.description: The identifier of the certificate that was issued. This field is set if the exercise has been completed and a certificate has been issued.

exerciseType.description:
Enumeration of exercise types.

 - CASH_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered in cash.
 - CASHLESS_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered by selling shares.
 - NET_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered by withholding shares.
 - BLENDED: The cost of exercise was covered by a combination of cash and selling of shares.

qualified.description:
*Deprecated*

True if the exercise option grant type is ISO. False otherwise.

items.description: The list of all exercises associated with this grant.

exercises.description: The list of all exercises associated with this grant.

lastModifiedDatetime.description: A complete calendar UTC date and time defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

voluntaryTerminationCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after voluntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

voluntaryTerminationPeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

involuntaryTerminationCauseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after involuntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

involuntaryTerminationCausePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

involuntaryTerminationCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after involuntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

involuntaryTerminationPeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

deathExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after death that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

deathExercisePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

disabilityExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after disability that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

disabilityExercisePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

retirementExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after retirement that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

retirementExercisePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

exercisePeriods.description: Exercise periods for the option grant. Unset values will be inherited from the equity plan from with the option was granted.

description: An option grant is a contract that gives an employee the right to purchase a company's stock at a set price.
